response:
module 1: identify the radius r of the zen garden  
the total area for dining is twice the area of the zen garden.  

module 2: calculate the area of the dining area and set up the equation  
area of dining = 2 * area of zen garden  
area of dining = 20 * 15 = 300 square meters  
area of zen garden = π * r²  
300 = 2 * π * r²  
r² = 150 / π  
r = √(150 / π)  

module 3: calculate the radius of the fountain  
radius of fountain = r / 3  
cost of fountain = 50 * surface area of cylinder  
surface area = 2 * π * r * h  
h = 1.5 meters  

module 4: calculate the total cost to cover the surface area of the cylindrical fountain  
cost = 50 * (2 * π * r * 1.5)  
r = √(150 / π)  
cost = 50 * (3 * π * √(150 / π))
